content.en:
100,000 years later.

Ye Tian's copied body returned to the Daoshan Realm, even if he infiltrated the Dark Destruction Domain, he still needed the cooperation of the main body, so he had to come back.

When the replica body returned, Ye Tian and the replicated body left the Dao Mountain Realm together, away from here, to prevent problems from occurring, thus affecting the Dao Mountain Realm, it would not be good.

In a dark forbidden area very far away from the Daoshan Realm.

Ye Tian came here with the copy body.

"It's time to start planning!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't know if this plan would succeed, if it did, he would not only be able to solve the fear of the Dao Mountain Realm, but also get a lot of benefits from the Dark Destruction Domain, and even some useful information.

If he fails, he will just lose a replica body, and it will have no effect on him.

"Here we go!"

Ye Tian began to cast a soul attack on the copied body.

He specially cultivated a secret technique from the battle gate that can cause the enemy's soul confusion and memory loss - the Chaos Soul Technique!

This secret art is very popular in the Dark Sacred Domain, but it is relatively difficult to cultivate, and it requires a domain ancestor with relatively high soul talent to practice.

And Ye Tian naturally practiced it easily, and now he can use his copy body.

It's a bit weird to attack himself on his own, but for the sake of planning, he has to.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian cast the Chaos Soul Trick and bombarded the soul of the copied body.

"Ahh!!!hh

The pain came, as if the soul had been torn apart.

Suddenly, the soul that copied the body began to go into confusion.

At the same time, Ye Tian held the Heaven Slaying Spear and kept attacking the replica body, bringing the replica body to the appearance of a heavy injury.

Then, the copy body continued to use various secret techniques to escape, making the injury more and more serious.

In this way, it is more realistic.

Soon after, the replicating body began to activate the Spacetime Key.

And Ye Tian's body had already left this area, he didn't want to be discovered by the powerhouses of the Demon Hell Clan after the gate of time and space was opened, and the body would be finished.

Buzz Buzz!!!!

The gate of time and space is becoming more and more solid, and the soul confusion of the replicating body is getting more and more serious, and the injuries on the body are getting more and more serious.

Soon, the gate of time and space was completely formed.

And Ye Tian also got into the other side of the gate of time and space, he grasped the timing very well, and after passing through the gate of time and space, he immediately fell into a deep sleep due to soul confusion.

-----------------

Dark Destruction Domain, Demon Hell Clan, Wind Demon City.

This is one of the ten ancestral cities of the Demon Hell Clan, and there is a gate of time and space here in the Wind Demon City, which was obtained by the Wind Demon City from the Destruction Holy Clan at a huge cost.

Now, the door of time and space has been opened.

It shows that in a distant place, the Hellite Clan's clansmen with the key to time and space opened the door of time and space.

Outside the Gate of Time and Space.

The elites of the Demon Hell Clan were stationed here, and when Ye Tian shuttled over as the Holy Son of the Dead Universe, he was immediately discovered by the domain ancestors of the Demon Hell Clan.

"It's the Dead Universe Holy Son, it's not good, the Dead Universe Holy Son is seriously injured and dying, please Wind Demon Lord!"

The Domain Ancestors of the Demon Hell Clan panicked.

The identity of the Son of the Dead Universe is not ordinary, he is one of the many heirs of Lord Wind Demon, and he is a very talented heir, otherwise, he would not be eligible to obtain a time and space key.

Soon, Ye Tian was sent away for treatment.

And several of the Demon Hell Clan's strongest domain ancestors passed through the gate of time and space, went to the other side to check the situation, and if they found an enemy, they would kill them immediately.

However, they shuttled through and found nothing.

However, the space-time gate exists for a limited time, and if it is maintained all the time, it will be very costly.

So, the Demon Hell Clan closed the door of time and space.

Wind Demon City, the City Lord's Mansion.

The Wind Demon Domain Ancestor was very annoyed, and could even be said to be angry.

As the city lord of one of the ten ancestral cities of the Demon Hell Clan, his status in the Demon Hell Bead is not ordinary, he is an invincible domain ancestor, and he is not weak among the invincible domain ancestors.

And the Demon Prison Clan is also among the top 100 among the three thousand evil clans, so it is conceivable that his status in the Dark Destruction Domain is also relatively high, and he has been dominating the Dark Destruction Domain for endless years.

Now, one of the heirs he values more, the Son of the Dead Universe, has been hit hard and almost falls.

However, what he didn't know was that his son had already fallen, but the distance was too far away for him to know his son's life and death, even if it was a secret treasure.

Even at the moment when Ye Tian returned, many of the treasures that originally belonged to the Dead Universe Holy Son would automatically consider Ye Tian to be the master, because under the approval of the Origin of the Dark Destruction Domain, Ye Tian's copied body was the Dead Universe Holy Son.

"How's my son?"

The Wind Demon Domain Ancestor asked a Supreme Domain Ancestor Aoki Domain Ancestor who was good at healing injuries, and asked.

"Lord Wind Demon, the Dead Universe Holy Son's injuries are almost healed, the key is the soul problem!"

Aoki Yuzu hurriedly said.

"Soul problems?"

Wind Demon Domain Ancestor frowned, this is not a trivial matter, once it involves the soul, it is a big problem.

"Lord Wind Demon, the Dead Saint Son was severely injured by the Chaos Soul Technique, it should be a domain ancestor who encountered the Dark Saint Universe, the soul needs a long time to recover, and some memories will be lost, and even if the recovery is not good, I am afraid that it will affect a little soul potential. "

Aoki Yuzu explained.

"Soul Mess, damn it!"

The Wind Demon Domain Ancestor also knew this secret art, a very terrifying secret art, but the cultivation difficulty was very high, even in the Dark Sacred Domain Society, there were very few people, and even fewer domain ancestors who were proficient in it.

The domain ancestor who can severely damage his son is afraid that he is a supreme domain ancestor.

I have to say that his son was very lucky to be able to save his life.

"Lord Wind Demon, the Holy Son of the Dead Universe went out with several Holy Sons of the Devouring Clan and the White Bone Clan, and now only the Holy Son of the Dead Universe has returned, and the other Holy Sons are afraid that they have fallen, this matter may be a little troublesome. Aoki Yuzu reminded.

"You don't need to worry about this matter, I'll take care of it. "

Wind Demon Domain Ancestor waved his hand.

......

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had already come to the Demon Hell Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain for a full ten thousand years.

In the past 10,000 years, he has been recovering from his injuries and treating his soul injuries, and by the way, he learned about the situation of the Demon Prison Bead and the identity of the Dead Son.

Through understanding, he is also familiar with some things about the Dead Son, and he can basically do it without revealing it.

Moreover, he has a memory deficit, and even if he forgets something familiar, the people of the Demon Hell Clan will not say anything.

In addition, Ye Tian handed over the Destruction Crystal and reported on their destruction of a realm, but later said that when he returned, he encountered a group of Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain, and the other Holy Sons were killed, and only he escaped by luck.

The people of the Demon Hell Clan naturally believed it, and this matter came to an end.

And the Destruction Crystal handed over by Ye Tian also allowed him to obtain a lot of contribution points, which could be exchanged for many resources and treasures from the Destruction Holy Clan, and even inheritance.

And in the ten thousand years that the Demon Hell Clan has been in, he has also had a preliminary understanding of the strength of the Dark Destruction Domain.

After understanding, he realized how terrifying the strength of the Dark Destruction Domain was!
